title: The Iron Claw
writer: Basil Dickey, George H. Plympton, Jesse Duffy
actors: Charles Quigley, Joyce Bryant, Forrest Taylor
plot: Miserly old Anton Benson once recovered a treasure in gold from a sunken Spanish galleon, and in his greed murdered anyone who got in his way of keeping it. Now his family is gathered at his estate, Bensonhurst, and they are all s...
